export const IngestionContract = {
  version: "1.0",
  providers: {
    googleDrive: {
      label: "Google Drive",
      enabled: true
    },
    oneDrive: {
      label: "Microsoft 365 / OneDrive",
      enabled: true
    }
  },

  // Folder → Ministry category mapping
  folderMap: {
    devotionals: ["devotional", "prayer", "scripture"],
    lessons: ["lesson", "study", "curriculum"],
    missions: ["mission", "task", "quest"],
    media: ["image", "video", "gallery"]
  },

  normalize(file) {
    return {
      id: file.id,
      title: file.name,
      type: file.mimeType?.includes("image")
        ? "image"
        : file.mimeType?.includes("video")
        ? "video"
        : "document",
      url: file.webViewLink || file.downloadUrl || file.url,
      createdAt: file.createdTime || Date.now(),
      tags: file.tags || []
    };
  }
};
